abstract: Integration recipe for `health_forge_oura` — the Oura Ring REST API adapter for Health Forge. 8 read-only metrics (sleep, readiness, stress, heart rate, activity, SpO2). Covers OAuth 2.0 PKCE setup, deep-link redirect handling, automatic pagination and rate limiting, and the OuraSleepExtension (readinessScore, temperatureDeviation, restingHeartRate). Note: code-complete with unit tests but not yet validated end-to-end against the live API.
